format_tokens: format a token count integer into a human-readable string like 1.2k or 12.3k
short_model: shorten a model ID string by stripping the prefix before the last slash
detect_image_protocol: detect the best chafa image output format for the current terminal emulator
review_TOOL_ICONS: review the TOOL_ICONS dictionary mapping tool names to their display emoji icons
review_SYM_CONSTANTS: review the symbol constants like SYM_OK SYM_ERR and SYM_WARN used in the TUI
